headline: Globe Life (NYSE:GL) Posts Q2 CY2026 Sales In Line With Estimates
summary: Insurance holding company Globe Life (NYSE:GL) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q2 CY2026, with sales up 6.7% year on year to $1.6 billion. Its GAAP profit of $3.65 per share was in line with analysts’ consensus estimates.

raw.headline: Globe Life (NYSE:GL) Posts Q2 CY2026 Sales In Line With Estimates
raw.summary: Insurance holding company Globe Life (NYSE:GL) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q2 CY2026, with sales up 6.7% year on year to $1.6 billion. Its GAAP profit of $3.65 per share was in line with analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: GLOBE LIFE INC. REPORTS SECOND QUARTER 2026 RESULTS
summary: Globe Life Inc. (NYSE: GL) reported today that for the quarter ended June 30, 2026, net income was $3.65 per diluted common share, compared with $3.05 per diluted common share for the year-ago quarter. Net operating income was $3.61 per diluted common share, compared with $3.27 per diluted common share for the year-ago quarter. The Company also increased full-year 2026 earnings guidance to a range of $15.55 to $15.95, an increase of $0.10 at the midpoint.
